stemHtml: Errors caused by the effect of coastal refraction on bearings at lower altitudes are maximum when the NDB is situated in which of the following positions?

options.a: Near the coast and the bearing crosses the coast at an acute angle.
options.b: Inland and the bearing crosses the coast at right angles.
options.c: Near the coast and the bearing crosses the coast at right angles.
options.d: Inland and the bearing crosses the coast at an acute angle.
